item.title:

item.title:

Enjoy a dunk to get in the
item.description:
PGA TOUR reposteó PGA TOUR Champions @ChampionsTour · 5min The @NBA playoffs start today!
Enjoy a dunk to get in the spirit, courtesy of Jim Furyk from the 2013 @RBC_Heritage
#TOURVault 1 1 5 1 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min Jordan Spieth was asked how the PGA Tour’s product could be made better following reports
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min Jordan Spieth was asked how the PGA Tour’s product could be made better following reports of LIV’s demise and the 3-time Major winner said:
“I miss Feherty.”
Q: Bring back David Feherty?
“Yeah… For sure, of course.”
(Via: @golfweek ) 1 2 13 1 mil
